title: Stage 4 overview: base view plus overlay API
description: Add render(model,{baseView,overlays}) path so overview base view and auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlays combine without reparsing.
triage_notes: Stage 4 advanced: permission overlay now synthesizes annotation edges from principal-holder nodes to node resources, with role/action labels and resource badges; RenderResult now exposes setBaseView, setOverlays, toggleOverlay, fit/reset no-ops, and destroy, allowing overlay changes without reparsing and updating the original target. Verification: typecheck, test (82), build pass. Remaining before TASK-002 closure: decide whether current overlay composition is sufficient for Stage 4 completion, or add custom-element/src engine integration as a separate engine task.
